div1.entryFree: Singular, alone in its kind, unparalleled, rare, eminent: what needeth then apologies be made, to set forth that which is so s.? Lucr. 32. a most s. and choice epithet, LLL V, 1, 17. so s. in each particular, Wint. IV, 4, 144. men of s. integrity and learning, H8 II, 4, 59. the jest may remain after the wearing sole s. Rom. II, 4, 68. Rom. II, 4, 68 some villain, ay, and s. in his art, Cymb. III, 4, 124. Adverbially: very s. good, H4B III, 2, 119.
